full_name: ABV-Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management, Gwalior
note: Fee structure was shared as Google Drive link, not in export. Telegram export processed: 48 photos + 6 videos uploaded to R2, labelled in media-index.json.

facts: ABV-IIITM Gwalior is an Institute of National Importance under Ministry of Education, Government of India.
Departments: Information Technology, Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical and Electronics, Engineering Sciences, Management Studies.
Cycles allowed inside campus.

boys.name: BH-2
boys.note: CG above 8 can get single room

boys.name: Aravali
boys.note: Confirmed from Telegram photo — Hindi signage reads Aravali Chhatrawas

hostels.girls: GH — all girls hostel, same sharing pattern as boys.
hostels.first_year_allocation: IVH or Satpura based on branch. Mess is in the same hostel.
hostels.gate_timing: Main gate closes at 10 PM. Late entry fine of Rs 5,000. Applies to both boys and girls.
hostels.room_furniture: Bed (mattress on floor), desk/table, chair, curtained window, electrical outlets, tube light — confirmed from Telegram hostel room photos.

facts: 1st year students eat at mess in their hostel (IVH or Satpura).
Cafeteria serves veg food.
OAT canteen serves non-veg food.
Night canteen available in specific hostels only, timing 10 PM to 2 AM.
mess.schedule_summary: Weekly mess schedule includes: Idli, Dosa, Paratha, Egg Bhurji, Chila for breakfast. Rice, Dal, Sabji, Papad for lunch. Pav Bhaji, Samosa, Pakoda, Chat for snacks. Roti, Rice, Dal, various sabji for dinner. Mix of North Indian cuisine.

fee_structure.status: PENDING — ambassador will provide updated PDF later

facts: Free WiFi available across entire campus including hostels.
75% attendance is mandatory.
If below 75%, must submit medical certificate. Otherwise not allowed to appear in exam.

canteen.night_canteen: Available in specific hostels only, 10 PM to 2 AM.

facts: 1st year: Laundry service Rs 800/month or pay per pair.
From 2nd year: Continue service or buy washing machine in group.
Single gym for both boys and girls.
Hospital inside campus near all hostels. Free of cost.
Hospital building confirmed from Telegram photo.
Convention hall with red carpeted stage, projector, podium — used for events and seminars.
Open Air Theatre (OAT) — large sandstone amphitheatre with tiered seating.
Auditorium building on campus.
Bio diversity park within campus.
International Visitors Hostel (IVH) — also used for 1st year students.
Lecture hall complex with multiple halls.
Management Studies department — Block 1.
EEE Department building.
Library building on campus.
Main gate with ABV-IIITM signage in Hindi and English.
Gwalior Railway Station is 3-4 km from campus.
Gwalior Airport is 6 km from campus.
Cycles allowed inside campus.

language_climate.language: Hindi is the local language. Professors teach in Hindi and English.
language_climate.climate: Very cold in winter (12-14°C, usually around 18°C). Very hot in summer (up to 42°C).
